title: RandomAll
description: The only randomizer you will ever need!
body:
# 🔀 RandomizeAll

A chaos-powered addon that **randomizes core Minecraft gameplay** in real time.  
Break blocks? Drops are shuffled.  
Open chests? Loot goes rogue.  
Kill mobs? Good luck predicting that.  

Built for **Fabric 1.21.x** and requires **Fabric API**.
Built for **Paper (and all its forks) 1.21.x**

---

## ✨ Features

- 🔲 **Block Drop Randomization**  
  Mining is no longer predictable — every block can drop *anything*.

- 📦 **Chest Loot Randomization**  
  Structures become pure RNG. A village chest might be stacked… or cursed.

- 🧟 **Mob Drop Randomization**  
  Mobs no longer follow loot tables. Every kill is a gamble.

- 📂 **Crafting Randomization**  
  Recipes? Do whatever you want, anything can be anything.

- 🔄 **Live Toggling**  
  Enable or disable randomization **without restarting the world**.

---

## 🧠 Commands

All commands use `/randomize`

```txt
/randomize blocks    - Toggle block drop randomization
/randomize chests    - Toggle chest loot randomization
/randomize mobs      - Toggle mob drop randomization
/randomize crafts  - Toggle crafting randomizations
/randomize all       - Toggle all randomizations
/randomize reset     - Reset all to normal
/randomize status    - Show current status
